# care.industries.meok.ai — UK Care-Homes Compliance Package | MEOK AI Labs

> The MEOK .AI Care-Homes compliance package. CQC + 14 LA commissioners. AI fall detection, medication reminders. £1,495 special. 4-day signed Ed25519 attestation. Sovereign UK. CSOAI Ltd, UK 16939677.

## Overview
care.industries.meok.ai — UK Care-Homes Compliance Package | MEOK AI Labs is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
